questionHtml: Explain why there are 216 possible quadratic functions that can be generated using this method.
markschemeHtml:
63   OR   6×6×6          A1

 

Note: Accept a labelled diagram that clearly illustrates correct application of the multiplication principle leading to 216.

 

=216          AG
